description: Processes each node independently and sums up the output.

parameterGroups.label: Crossover Frequencies
parameterGroups.rationale: Three crossover frequency parameters define the boundaries between four frequency bands. Each parameter routes to four LR filters (one per band) at that crossover point.

gaps.question: freq_split4 has 4 bands and 3 crossover parameters vs freq_split2's 2 bands and 1 crossover. Each crossover parameter connects to 4 LR filters (lr1_N through lr4_N). Is the internal logic identical to freq_split2 except for additional bands and crossovers, with interior bands using cascaded HP+LP stages?
gaps.context: If identical in structure, the doc can reference the base variant and note only the band count and parameter count difference.

notes: Variant of freq_splitN with N=4. Three crossover parameters (Band 1, Band 2, Band 3) each connect to 4 LR filters. Default crossover frequencies are spaced roughly logarithmically: ~38 Hz, ~391 Hz, ~2186 Hz.
